items.title: Spurs' Simons ruled out for season, to miss WC
items.summary: Tottenham forward Xavi Simons will play no further part this season and miss the World Cup this summer after a suspected anterior cruciate ligament injury in Spurs' win over Wol...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Wolvaardt, Mlaba complete comprehensive 4-1 series win for South Africa
items.summary: Wolvaardt's 92* took the hosts to 155 and India never got going in the chase
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: IPL 2026: Poor selection calls hurting Super Kings
items.summary: Sunday’s loss to the Gujarat Titans exposed how the brain trust has made a hash of selections
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
